properties.description: Unique identifier for activity-level aggregated risk record.
properties.business_rules: Must be unique, Cannot be null
properties.business_description: Unique identifier combining learning activity and assessment date for activity-level risk snapshots.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for null values, Validate uniqueness
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by loId, Filter by date

properties.description: Date of the activity-level risk assessment.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be a valid date, Updated daily
properties.business_description: Reference date for activity snapshot, enabling time-series analysis of activity-specific compliance trends.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure not in future, Validate date format, Check for missing dates
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Filter by specific date
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by date, GROUP BY month

properties.description: Reference to the learning activity.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must reference valid loID in Activity_csod table
properties.business_description: Links risk assessment to specific compliance training activity for content-level analysis.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate foreign key relationship with Activity_csod
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific activity, Filter by activityType
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by loId, GROUP BY activityType

properties.description: Name of the compliance training activity.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Should match Activity_csod.activityName
properties.business_description: Human-readable activity name for reporting and communication.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate against Activity_csod, Check for consistency
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific activities, Search by name pattern

properties.description: Type/category of the compliance activity.
properties.common_patterns: Compliance, Certification, Safety Training, Ethics Training
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Should match Activity_csod.activityType
properties.business_description: Activity categorization for type-level analysis and reporting.
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific types, Group by type
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by activityType, GROUP BY activityType

properties.description: Total number of users assigned to this activity.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be > 0
properties.business_description: Activity reach/coverage metric indicating scale of compliance requirement.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure positive values, Validate against Transcript_csod
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by high-volume activities (>1000)

properties.description: Average composite risk score for this activity.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100
properties.business_description: Primary KPI for activity-level compliance health, enabling identification of problematic training content or delivery.
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter high-risk activities (>75), Compare to org average
properties.aggregation_suggestions: AVERAGE across activities, MAX, MIN, RANK

properties.description: Median composite risk score for this activity.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100
properties.business_description: Robust central tendency showing typical activity risk unaffected by outlier users.
properties.filtering_suggestions: Compare to average for skew analysis

properties.description: Variance in risk scores across users for this activity.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0
properties.business_description: Risk consistency metric; high variance suggests activity affects different populations differently.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure non-negative, Flag high variance activities
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter high variance (>500) for investigation

properties.description: Number of users with critical risk for this activity.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0, Must be <= totalAssignments
properties.business_description: Volume of severe risk cases requiring immediate activity-specific intervention.
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by non-zero, Filter high counts

properties.description: Number of users with high risk for this activity.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0, Must be <= totalAssignments
properties.business_description: Volume of elevated risk requiring activity-level remediation strategies.
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by activity type

properties.description: Number of overdue assignments for this activity.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0, Must be <= totalAssignments
properties.business_description: Current violations for this specific activity, indicating content or delivery issues.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure non-negative, Validate <= totalAssignments, Alert on increases
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by non-zero, Filter high percentages

properties.description: Percentage of users who completed this activity.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100
properties.business_description: Activity-specific completion performance, key metric for content effectiveness evaluation.
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter low performers (<70%), Compare to org average
properties.aggregation_suggestions: AVERAGE across activities, MAX, MIN, RANK

properties.description: Average time users take to complete this activity (days).
properties.business_rules: Can be null if no completions, Must be positive
properties.business_description: Activity-specific velocity metric indicating content difficulty and user engagement.
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter slow activities (>60 days), Compare activities

properties.description: Estimated duration of the activity (minutes).
properties.business_rules: Can be null if not specified, Must be positive if provided
properties.business_description: Expected time commitment from Activity_csod, used for workload planning.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure positive values, Validate against Activity_csod
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by duration ranges

properties.description: Percentage of users who passed on first attempt.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if no attempts, Must be between 0 and 100
properties.business_description: Content difficulty/clarity indicator; low rates suggest need for content improvement.
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter problematic activities (<50%)

properties.description: Average number of attempts before completion.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if no completions, Must be >= 1.0
properties.business_description: Difficulty indicator; high attempts suggest content complexity or clarity issues.
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter difficult activities (>2 attempts)

properties.description: Rank of activity by avgRiskScore (1 = lowest risk/best).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be > 0, Lower is better
properties.business_description: Comparative ranking enabling identification of most problematic activities.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure positive values, Validate ranking logic
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter bottom performers (rank > 90th percentile)

properties.description: Number of assignments requiring escalation for this activity.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0, Must be <= totalAssignments
properties.business_description: Activity-level intervention workload for targeted support.
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter high volumes, Compare activities

properties.description: Risk trend direction for this activity (7-day comparison).
properties.business_rules: Can be null for first assessment, Valid values: 'Improving', 'Deteriorating', 'Stable'
properties.business_description: Directional indicator for activity performance tracking.
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by Deteriorating for content review

properties.description: Training content provider or vendor.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if internal, Should match Activity_csod.provider
properties.business_description: Content source for vendor performance evaluation.
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific providers, Group by provider
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by provider, AVERAGE risk by provider

properties.description: Indicates if activity content needs review.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Valid values: 'Yes', 'No', Yes if avgRiskScore > 75 OR completionRate < 50% OR avgAttempts > 2
properties.business_description: Automated flag for content quality assurance and improvement initiatives.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate against allowed values, Ensure logic consistency
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by Yes for content improvement queue
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by Yes/No, PERCENTAGE requiring review

properties.description: Recommended intervention approach for this activity.
properties.common_patterns: Content Revision, Extended Deadlines, Additional Support, Instructor-Led Sessions
properties.business_rules: Can be null for low-risk activities, Multiple strategies separated by semicolons
properties.business_description: System-generated recommendations for activity-level risk mitigation.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate format, Ensure not null for high-risk activities
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific strategies

properties.description: Gold layer table containing activity-level aggregated compliance risk metrics enabling content effectiveness analysis, vendor evaluation, and activity-specific improvement strategies.
properties.business_purpose: Enables activity scorecards, content quality assessment, vendor performance evaluation, and identification of problematic training content requiring revision or replacement.
properties.data_lineage: Aggregated from ComplianceRisk_Silver table with daily refresh, grouped by learning activity with enrichment from Activity_csod.
properties.data_retention: Data retained for 3 years for content lifecycle analysis and vendor performance tracking.
properties.key_relationships: Aggregates from ComplianceRisk_Silver, joins with Activity_csod for activity attributes
properties.queryPatterns: ["Filter by loId or activityName for activity-specific analysis", "Filter by assessmentDate for time-series analysis", "Group by activityType for activity category analysis", "Filter by activityRank to find best/worst performing activities", "Calculate completion rates and risk metrics by activity", "Filter by contentReviewFlag to find activities needing review", "Group by provider for vendor performance evaluation", "Filter by activityTrend to identify improving/declining activities"]
properties.useCases: ["Activity Scorecards: Generate activity-level compliance risk summaries", "Content Quality Assessment: Identify problematic training content requiring revision", "Vendor Performance Evaluation: Compare training providers by risk metrics", "Activity Effectiveness Analysis: Measure training effectiveness by activity", "Content Review Management: Find activities flagged for content review", "Activity Ranking: Rank activities by risk scores and completion rates", "Trend Analysis: Track activity-level risk trends over time", "Intervention Strategy: Identify activities requiring specific intervention strategies"]

properties.displayName: Activity Aggregates to Source Assessments Relationship
properties.description: Each activity summary aggregates all user risk assessments for that activity

properties.displayName: Activity Aggregates to Activity Details Relationship
properties.description: Activity metrics enriched with activity metadata
